rulings.Case Title: EST OF HENRY SINIGIANI
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 6/20/22. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: The only correct form of notice for a petition for appointment of a personal representative is the mandatory Judicial Council form DE-121 (Notice of Petition to Administer Estate). The only correct form of Waiver of Bond is the mandatory Judicial Council form DE-142/DE-111(A-3e). Item 3g(1)(d) has unchecked boxes. Item 3g(4) of the petition should have been checked, as there was a prior personal representative. Item 8 of the petition is missing the surviving child. The grandchildren and daughter-in-law are presumably the issue and surviving spouse of the surviving child, but item 8 of the petition does not indicate this. [LRSF 14.18 C.3.] Courtesy copies of the supplement to the petition, signed and verified by the proposed personal representative, and correct waivers of bond and proof of service must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 6/10/22. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: EST OF SARAH D. SINIGIANI
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 6/20/22. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: The only correct form of notice for a petition for appointment of a personal representative is the mandatory Judicial Council form DE-121 (Notice of Petition to Administer Estate). The only correct form of Waiver of Bond is the mandatory Judicial Council form DE-142/DE-111(A-3e). The petition caption is incomplete, if the petitioner is seeking IAEA authority. Item 3a(1) or (2) of the petition must be answered. Item 3e(2) of the petition is not the appropriate box, when there are no designated beneficiaries (no will). Nor should any box be checked in item 3f(2) of the petition when there is no will. Item 3g(1)(d) has unchecked boxes. Item 3g(4) of the petition should have been checked, as there was a prior personal representative. Item 5a(2) of the petition does not appear to be correct if Decedent was still married to Henry Sinigiani, who survived her and died on 5/15/89. Item 5a(3) or (4) and item 5a(5)(a) or (b) of the petition must be answered. Item 8 of the petition is missing the surviving spouse (if she and Henry Sinigiani were still married at the time of her death) and the surviving child. The grandchildren and daughter-in-law are presumably the issue and surviving spouse of the surviving child, but item 8 of the petition does not indicate this. [LRSF 14.18 C.3.] Courtesy copies of the supplement to the petition, signed and verified by the proposed personal representative, and correct waivers of bond and proof of service must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 6/10/22. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: THE OWYANG REVOCABLE TRUST DATED JULY 26,2000
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Verified Petition To Remove Trustee For Breach Of Trust; For Accounting; To Appoint Successor Trustee; For Surcharge; For Imposition Of Constructive Trust; And For Emotional Damages
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. NO COURTESY COPY OF THE CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED ON 5/2/22 HAS BEEN RECEIVED YET BY THE ASSIGNED EXAMINER. [LRSF 2.7 B. and 14.7 B. and C.] (In fact, no courtesy copy of any of the joint status reports filed on 10/27/21, 12/23/21, or 2/23/22 has been provided either, as required by Local Rules and as ordered on 10/7/21.) A JC form CM-110 for general Civil matters is not appropriate for case management status updates in Probate, where petitions are filed by petitioners, not complaints by plaintiffs. Furthermore, in Probate proceedings, individuals (fiduciaries, heirs, beneficiaries, or other interested parties) are entitled to direct notice as well as their attorneys, not just the attorneys. [CRC 7.51.] Due to COVID-19, counsel and parties should appear remotely through Zoom or CourtCall whenever possible. Please review the 11th amended general order on the court's website for information on appearing remotely. For Zoom appearance: Meeting ID is 875 8017 7925 and password is 722809. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. PARTIES APPEARING MUST CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING USING THEIR FULL NAME.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE VIRGINIA N. CACAL special needs TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #3, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 06/27/2022. Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. 1) Please explain the date of the court order authorizing the 01/09/2020 Trustee Fees paid totaling $4220.00. It appears the only court orders addressing fees during this account period are dated 10/06/2020 for $4,130.00 and 11/23/2021 for $4,080.00 which are both after the 01/09/2020 distribution date in the account. Please address CRC 7.700(a) and CRC 7.700(b). 2) The Court's order approving Mr. Corey's 2nd account did not approve the Trustee made investments without prior court approval. Please explain as it appears in this account investments have occurred again without prior court approval. (See Local Rule 14.49 C.) An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 6/13/2022. [LRSF 14.7 B.]

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE DEL PRADO FAMILY TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Remove Court Appointed Trustee For Trust Violations, Mismanagement Of Property And Trust Assets, Demand For Full Accounting On Proceeds Of Property Sale And For Damages Attributable To Trustees Malfeasance
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The following issues e-mailed to the petitioner on 02/16/2022 have not been addressed: 1) A complete copy of the trust must be provided. 2) The petition must state the names and addresses of all beneficiaries. See CRC 7.902. 3) The petition must be properly verified. Verification mut include language required by CCP section 2015.5. 4) Notice of the amended petition or amendments to the petition filed on 02/10/2022 must be given to the trustee and beneficiaries and their attorneys. Probate Code sections 17203 & 1214. The proof of service filed on 04/14/2022 only states that notice of the petition was given, without referring to the "amendments" or "amended" petition. No copy of the petition or any other pleading was served with notice. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appear by video and that they input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review the Court's 11th Amended General Order which took effect on 04/25/2022 and LRSF 14.1(D) for more information.

rulings.Rulings: continued to july 18, 2022 to be after the motion to amend the petition. if that motion is granted, this hearing will be moved again to allow time for proper notice. please note, examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.18.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF KALVIN M. MA
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 6/20/22. No courtesy copies of papers filed since 3/21/22 were received by the assigned examiner by the deadline of 5/5/22 (or even as of 5/9/22). Courtesy copies of the supplement to the second amended petition and any other papers filed in support of the second amended petition must be received by the assigned examiner by no later than 6/10/22. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE LEON GOMEZ CHANG AND MARIA C. GOMEZ CHANG REVOCABLE TRUST DATED JUNE 2, 2002
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Invalidate Trust; For Constructive Trust; For Breach Of Trust; To Compel Information; Fo
rulings.Rulings: Hearing appearance required. Please review Local Rule 14.1 D. for information regarding remote appearances. To appear by Zoom, go to Zoom.com and click Join Meeting, and use the ID and password below. Meeting ID: 875 8017 7925 Password: 722809 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Parties appearing should check in for the hearing using their first and last name. ISSUES (may be addressed at hearing): 1) Court to determine how to proceed. 2) Respondent filed a "preliminary response." No legal authority cited. Respondent should be prepared at the hearing to cite probate code sections/legal authority that allow for filing a preliminary response.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE YANG SU CHO 2015 LIVING TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Beneficiary'S Petition To Remove The Trustee And Order Instructions Pursuant To Probate Code 17200
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 06/27/2022. Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. 1) Eun Tae Kim must receive 30 days notice or file a verified waiver of notice. Petitioner's Declaration alleging Eun Tae Kim does not want to receive any documents in not sufficient. (Probate Code 1202). 2) Petitioner must give 30 days notice to Kyung Ja Kim at her last known address which appears to be in Los Angeles. (Probate Code 1202). An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 6/13/2022. [LRSF 14.7 B.]

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE RESTATEMENT OF THE MIRIAM V.R. TORTOLERO REVOCABLE TRUST, DATED AUGUST 14, 1992
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Confirming Certain Assets Are Trust Property
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF FRANCINE MARIE DOUGLASS
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 06/27/2022. Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. 1) Monica A. Douglass has priority to serve as administrator under Probate Code 8461. Please file a declination to serve/nomination from Monica A. Douglass. 2) Please file a Duties and Liabilities with all the required personal representative information. Duties and Liabilities must include the personal representatives address and telephone number not c/o the attorney information. 3) Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number (Judicial Council Form DE-147S) is also required, pursuant to Probate Code 8404(b). Form DE-147S must be filed separately and confidentially (with a cover page). Do not file form DE-147S as an attachment to the Duties and Liabilities form.[LRSF 14.18 An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 6/13/2022. [LRSF 14.7 B.]

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JONATHAN NGUYEN
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 6/20/22. Still no courtesy copies as of the deadline of 5/6/22. Only a proposed order was received as of 5/9/22. Courtesy copies of the petition and all supporting documents must be received by the assigned examiner by no later than 6/10/22. (It does not appear that the Acknowldgment of Receipt of the Duties & Liabilities was complete.) Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF FREDERICK C. YARED
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 06/20/2022. Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. 1) Petitioner must select a box on page 1 of the petition under #2. D. (1), (2), or (3). 2) Petitioner must select a box on page 3 of the petition under #5.a. (7) or (8). 3) Please file a DE-147 that includes all required information including petitioner's phone number. 6) Examiner received an unfiled copy of the DE-147S which has been recycled. Examiners will not review unfiled documents. Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number (Judicial Council Form DE-147S) is also required, pursuant to Probate Code 8404(b). Form DE-147S must be filed separately and confidentially (with a cover page). Do not file form DE-147S as an attachment to the Duties and Liabilities form.[LRSF 14.18 E.]
